title: Coeur d'Alene, ID — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Coeur d’Alene is a city in ID with a population of 55,000. Lake resort city in northern Idaho with stunning scenery, golf, and outdoor recreation.
